---
title: "_master"
format: html
---

```{r Load Libraries}
library(tidycensus)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(educationdata)
library(rnassqs)
library(reticulate)
library(ellmer)
library(shiny)
library(bslib)
```

```{r Load API Keys}
nassqs_auth(key = Sys.getenv("NASS_API_KEY"))
```
